summary_en: Chukyo Nippon Broadcasting completed acquisition of 500,000 treasury shares (1.90% of outstanding) for ¥584 million via off-auction trading on Nagoya Stock Exchange.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Auction Trading (N-NET3) and Termination of Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief: Chukyo Nippon Broadcasting (9402, Nagoya Premier Market) announced on 18 May 2026 the completion of a treasury share acquisition program. The company repurchased 500,000 ordinary shares representing 1.90% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock) for a total of ¥584 million via off-auction trading (N-NET3) on the Nagoya Stock Exchange. The acquisition was executed on 18 May 2026 and represents the full completion of the Board resolution dated 15 May 2026. The company stated the repurchase was undertaken to implement flexible capital allocation in response to changing market conditions and stock valuations, while improving capital efficiency, enhancing corporate value, and strengthening shareholder returns.
